## OOM Triage

_Where the reachable heap is concentrated, at a glance._

- **Headline retainer:** `org.apache.spark.storage.memory.MemoryStore` (a single object) retains 16.6 MB (28.4% of reachable heap).
- **Concentration:** Retention is spread across multiple roots.
- **Shape:** deep (retention flows through long dominator chains — often nested collections or linked structures) — 90% of objects within depth 8, max depth 967.
- **One leak or many:** the single biggest object retains 28.4% and the top 10 retain 51.5% of the heap; 11 object(s) each hold >=1%.
